disable.title: Disable wiki?
disable.message: Disable wiki on "{{kbName}}"? By default we only flip the toggle off; existing wiki pages are preserved and will be reused if you re-enable later. The knowledge base itself is not deleted.

alsoDestroy.title: Also permanently destroy all wiki data
alsoDestroy.description: Wipes every wiki page / proposal / lint finding / operation log for this KB. Irreversible. Only the KB itself and raw documents are preserved. Use this when the wiki quality is poor and you want a clean re-ingest.

empty.intro: Wiki continuously compiles uploaded raw documents into markdown entity / concept / summary pages, cross-linked via [[slug]] references.
empty.enableForKb: Enable wiki for a knowledge base
empty.roleHint: Enabling wiki requires OWNER or ADMIN role on the KB.
empty.noPagesDesc: Trigger an Ingest from this KB's documents — the LLM will compile them into wiki proposals for your review. Or create the first page manually.

reader.selectFromLeft: Select a page on the left to view

query.title: Ask Wiki
query.subtitle: Answers grounded in indexed wiki pages (inline + RAG)

export.noPagesToExport: This wiki has no pages to export

settings.title: Wiki settings
settings.subtitle: Control ingest token budget, inline boundaries, and auto-lint cadence
settings.autoIngestEnabledDesc: When on, the scheduler auto-builds wiki pages from new KB documents every 5 minutes, consuming LLM quota (billed to the consumer's BYOK). Turn off to stop auto-building; manual Ingest still works.

enabledLocales.title: Enabled languages
enabledLocales.description: Single-locale KBs only produce pages in the chosen language; bilingual KBs run a cross-language translation pass linked by translationGroupId.

translate.title: Translate existing pages to {{target}}
translate.description: For each page that lacks the target locale, an LLM produces a translation preserving [[wiki-link]] references, technical terminology, and markdown structure. The KB is switched to bilingual mode on success.
translate.alreadyBilingual: This KB is already bilingual — nothing to translate.

diff.title: Wiki proposal review

conflict.title: Conflicting proposal

lint.emptyForCategory: No unresolved findings in this category

log.empty: No operation records yet. Ingest / Lint / Edit / Revert events will appear here.

onboarding.needKeyDesc: Submit a request. Typically handled within 24h. Assigned keys have per-user quotas.
onboarding.keyPanelIntro: Save any one Provider Key below; onboarding completes automatically on success.
onboarding.requestPanelIntro: Click below to open the request form. While waiting for approval you can still enter the app; AI calls will be blocked until a Key is available.

errors.noSystemKeyDesc: Admins have not configured this Provider in Secret Manager yet.

leader.description: Responsible for understanding research tasks, planning research dimensions, assigning tasks to researchers, and coordinating team collaboration. The Leader analyzes topic requirements, develops research strategies, and dynamically adjusts research directions based on progress.
leader.skills: Task Understanding, Research Planning, Team Coordination, Quality Control, Report Review
leader.tools: Task Decomposer, Research Planner, Quality Assessor
leader.name: Research Leader

researcher.description: Responsible for executing specific dimension research tasks, including information retrieval, data analysis, and key findings extraction. Researchers use multiple data sources to gather information and conduct in-depth analysis.
researcher.skills: Information Retrieval, Data Analysis, Key Findings, Trend Identification, Evidence Collection
researcher.tools: Web Search, Academic Search, Data Analyzer, PDF Parser
researcher.name: Research Agent

reviewer.description: Responsible for reviewing the quality, accuracy, and consistency of research results. Reviewers check the credibility of data sources, logical validity of arguments, and provide improvement suggestions.
reviewer.skills: Quality Assessment, Consistency Check, Accuracy Verification, Logic Review, Improvement Suggestions
reviewer.tools: Quality Assessor, Fact Checker, Consistency Analyzer
reviewer.name: Quality Reviewer

synthesizer.description: Responsible for integrating research results from all dimensions and writing professional research reports. Writers organize content structure, refine core perspectives, and generate highly readable research reports.
synthesizer.skills: Content Integration, Report Writing, Perspective Refinement, Structure Organization, Visualization
synthesizer.tools: Report Generator, Summary Extractor, Visualization Tool
synthesizer.name: Report Synthesizer

tools.title: My Tools
tools.description: Manage your external tool API keys, or request system-level tool access
tools.grantInfo: Tools work out of the box using the shared platform key. You can optionally use one of your own keys or add a new one to override.

modal.configureDesc: Enter the API key for this tool (secret name: {{secretName}}). Takes effect immediately.
modal.requestDesc: After submitting, an admin will review your request. Once approved you can use the shared system key.
